title: Hammer pig pickaxe
description: A simple resource pack that adds the ability to change the appearance of the pickaxe.
body:
For correct work you need Optifine or CITResewn

Rename your pickaxe to "Hammer Pig" so that it becomes a hammer.
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c06b24b01e639e0e7b3a0aea5ade15587caa4b70.png)
